> **IMPORTANT**: For critical or high-severity vulnerabilities, do NOT open a public issue.
> Follow the responsible disclosure process in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

## Security Issue Description
A clear description of the security concern.

- [ ] Terraform module

- [ ] Python script

- [ ] IAM permissions
- [ ] Network policy
- [ ] Other: ___

## Severity Assessment
- [ ] Critical (CVSS 9.0–10.0) — Use SECURITY.md instead
- [ ] High (CVSS 7.0–8.9) — Use SECURITY.md instead
- [ ] Medium (CVSS 4.0–6.9)
- [ ] Low (CVSS 0.1–3.9)
